n: Chapter 9.1: A New Dawn for Umbar

steps.t: The Meeting-hall of Dâr Laja in the Upper Ward of Umbar Baharbêl has now been opened to the people of the city so they may bring their concerns before…
Daxamat stands within the entryway of Dâr Laja.
Daxamat told you his brother Jajax has gone to speak with the Kindred in the main hall of Dâr Laja.
Jajax is keeping an eye on the coffer containing suggestions for those who might join the leadership of the Kindred of the Coins, and he would like yo…
Hármelak has called for you to speak with her in the main hall of Dâr Laja.
